title: Ucriana wallichii
taxonomy: Ucriana wallichii is a genus of flowering plants in the family Rubiaceae. The Ucriana wallichii genus is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Ucriana wallichii places it in the order Gentianales and in the clade Asterids. It has been classified as a member of the family Rubiaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Ucriana wallichii is closely related to other genera within the Rubiaceae family, such as Psychotria and Urophyllum.
